h.name: Hamzat ul Wasl
h.description: The connecting hamza, only pronounced when starting on it.

s.name: Silent
s.description: A letter written but not pronounced.

l.name: Laam Shamsiyyah
l.description: The silent ل of ال before a sun letter.

p.name: Madd Munfasil 4-5
p.description: Permissible four-to-five count prolongation across word boundaries.

q.name: Qalqalah
q.description: Echoing sound on ق ط ب ج د when sukoon.

o.name: Madd Muttasil 4-5
o.description: Obligatory four-to-five count prolongation within a word.

c.name: Ikhfa Shafawi
c.description: Partial hiding of م before ب.

f.name: Ikhfa
f.description: Partial hiding of ن ساكنة or tanwīn before 15 letters.

i.name: Iqlab
i.description: Converting ن ساكنة / tanwīn into م before ب.

a.name: Idgham With Ghunnah
a.description: Merging into ي ن م و with nasalization.

u.name: Idgham Without Ghunnah
u.description: Merging into ل ر without nasalization.

d.name: Idgham Mutajanisain
d.description: Merging of letters from the same articulation point.

b.name: Idgham Mutaqaribain
b.description: Merging of letters from nearby articulation points.

g.name: Ghunnah
g.description: Two-count nasalization on shaddah of ن or م.
